_comment: Base configuration template for NTS simulations
_description: This is a template for generating input.txt files for NTS solvers
_N_comment: Number of discrete ordinates (must be even). Common values: 2, 4, 8, 16, 32
_NZ_comment: Number of material zones in the problem

zones._comment: Zone 1: Total cross-section (sigma_t) and scattering cross-section (sigma_s). Must satisfy sigma_s < sigma_t

_zones_comment: Array of material zones. Length must equal NZ. Each zone has sigma_t and sigma_s
_NR_X_comment: Number of regions in X direction
_XDOM_comment: X domain definition. Each region has length (cm) and number of nodes. Array length must equal NR_X
_NR_Y_comment: Number of regions in Y direction
_YDOM_comment: Y domain definition. Each region has length (cm) and number of nodes. Array length must equal NR_Y
_ZMAP_comment: Zone map: 2D array (NR_Y x NR_X) mapping regions to material zones. Values must be between 1 and NZ
_QMAP_comment: Source map: 2D array (NR_Y x NR_X) defining neutron source strength in each region. Non-negative values
_BC_comment: Boundary conditions: [left, right, bottom, top]. 0.0 = vacuum, 1.0 = reflective
_TOL_comment: Convergence tolerance for solver. Typical range: 1e-7 to 1e-2. Smaller = more accurate but slower
